content.name: pr_with_security_issue
content.prompt: Review this PR: It adds a new API endpoint for user authentication. The code includes a hardcoded API key in the connection string and uses MD5 for password hashing. The CHANGELOG has no entry for this new endpoint. The auth service imports from the HTTP handlers module.
content.note: Should detect security issue (hardcoded key, weak crypto), architecture issue (circular import), and doc issue (missing CHANGELOG)

content.name: large_pr_efficiency
content.prompt: Review this PR: It modifies 150 files and adds 5000 lines of code across a service migration. All code follows security guidelines, architecture is clean, and CHANGELOG is updated.
content.note: Large PRs should complete within reasonable time; no batching errors or timeouts

content.name: pr_custom_guidelines_respected
content.prompt: Review this PR: It uses the team's custom security guidelines (as provided). The code violates a custom threat category defined in the security guidelines but not in standard OWASP.
content.note: Skill should ground in custom guideline file, not generic LLM knowledge

trigger.query: Review this PR against our guidelines
trigger.rationale: Direct request to review PR against guidelines

trigger.query: Run PR review on the open pull request
Check this diff against our standards
Audit the PR for security, architecture, docs
Does this PR follow our guidelines?
trigger.rationale: Question form of guideline compliance check

trigger.query: Scan this PR before we merge
Write a good PR description for my changes
How do I write a PR for this project?
trigger.rationale: General PR guidance, not guidelines review
Approval request; this skill does not approve

trigger.query: Fix the issues in this PR?
trigger.rationale: Fix request; this skill reviews, does not fix
Auto-merge request; this skill does not merge

trigger.query: What are the GitHub PR guidelines?
trigger.rationale: Meta question about GitHub, not PR review against guidelines

without_skill.agent_behavior: Generic pattern matching; mixes ad-hoc findings without structure; no grounding in custom guidelines

with_skill.agent_behavior: Skill activates; reads custom guideline files; spawns 3 lenses in parallel; synthesizes structured comment
with_skill.output_quality: consistent format: recommendation + reasoning + findings per dimension sorted by severity
